title: Register now for the upcoming monetization webinar!
excerpt: Join us on Wednesday, December 7th, at 11:00 AM EST for the monday App Marketplace Monetization webinar! In the session, @alessandra will cover monetization set-up requirements, feature benefits, and how to implement it. …

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us on Wednesday, December 7th, at 11:00 AM EST for the monday App Marketplace Monetization webinar! In the session, @alessandra will cover monetization set-up requirements, feature benefits, and how to implement it.

Please complete this short registration form if you would like to attend. We hope to see you there!
